title: adicea ceratocalyx
intro: Adicea ceratocalyx, also known as the 'Yellow Bird of Paradise', is a flowering plant species within the family Rubiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and fever, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Adicea ceratocalyx include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Adicea ceratocalyx is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion by brewing the leaves and flowers in hot water, or as a powder by drying and grinding the plant material.
